incidents.title: US-Iran peace deal could see strait of Hormuz open on Friday ‘under Iranian arrangements’, says state media – Middle East crisis live

#US President Donald Trump said the deal with Iran would bring "peace and security" to the whole region. "With the opening of the Strait upon the signing of the Deal on Friday, for purposes of mine removal, oil will flow on both ends again for the region, and the world," he said on Truth Social. #Kuna

#Pakistan PM Shehbaz #Sharif, while announcing US-Iran deal, thanked mediation efforts by "our brothers," including #Qatar for "their support in reaching this agreement." Sharif also thanked the "visionary leadership" of #SaudiArabia & #Turkiye for their immediate contributions. "Mediators will facilitate a series of meetings this week. These pre-implementation discussions will lay the foundation for the technical talks and official signing ceremony," said Sharif. #Kuna

#US President Donald Trump announced a deal with Iran "is now complete." Trump, on his Truth Social account, said he would fully authorize "toll free opening of the Strait or Hormuz," as well as authorize "immediate remove of the United States Naval blockade." #Kuna

#Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif announced Sunday peace deal between #US & Iran "has been REACHED," and the signing ceremony would be held on June 19 in Switzerland. "Both sides have declared the immediate and permanent termination of military operations on all fronts, including in Lebanon," Sharif said on X. #Kuna

Following Mansoor bin Mohammed’s call to support blood donation, and coinciding with World Blood Donor Day, Dubai Health announces that the ‘My Blood, for My Country’ campaign has attracted strong participation from donors and participating entities, recording 43,263 donors from 145 nationalities over the past six months, with first-time donors accounting for 39.5% of the total. The ‘My Blood, for My Country’ campaign is organised in partnership with Al Ameen Service, Dubai Health Authority, Dubai Health, and Emarat Al Youm newspaper.

Hamdan bin Mohammed: Today, we directed the launch of the second edition of the Dubai Mallathon, the first initiative of its kind globally to transform Dubai’s shopping malls into vibrant sports and community destinations throughout the summer. From 15 June to 15 September 2026, malls across Dubai will open daily for walking, running, and a range of sports activities. Open to all, the initiative aims to encourage a healthier, more active lifestyle by making fitness accessible and enjoyable for everyone. حقق فريق المشاة بعصا قياس الخطوات المركز الثالث في المنافسات العسكرية الدولية لعام 2026، التي أُقيمت في أكاديمية ساندهيرست الملكية بالمملكة المتحدة، بمشاركة عدد من الفرق العسكرية الدولية. وتُعد هذه المشاركة الأولى للفريق على المستوى الدولي، حيث نجح في تحقيق إنجاز لافت بحصوله على المركز الثالث، ما يعكس مستوى الكفاءة والجاهزية والاحترافية التي يتمتع بها منتسبوه. ويأتي هذا الإنجاز ثمرةً للتدريب المتواصل والانضباط العسكري والالتزام بأعلى معايير الأداء، بما يجسد القدرات المتميزة للقوات المسلحة في مختلف المحافل الدولية.
